brandDescription: Kia is a leading automotive manufacturer known for bold design, innovative technology, and exceptional value. From the all-new Seltos that embodies the spirit of being 'Badass. Forever.' to the futuristic EV6 and EV9 electric vehicles, Kia continues to push boundaries with cutting-edge design, advanced safety, and premium features.

models.name: Seltos 1.5L Smartstream Petrol MT
models.description: The all-new Kia Seltos is badass. Forever. With ADAS Level 2 featuring 21 Autonomous Features, Dual Pane Panoramic Sunroof, and Command-Centric Trinity Panoramic Display. Backed by a 5-star BNCAP safety rating. Dimensions – 4,460 mm L x 1,830 mm W x 1,635 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,690 mm.

models.name: Seltos 1.5L Smartstream Petrol IVT
models.description: The all-new Kia Seltos is badass. Forever. With ADAS Level 2 featuring 21 Autonomous Features, Dual Pane Panoramic Sunroof, and Command-Centric Trinity Panoramic Display. models.name: Seltos 1.5L Smartstream T-GDi Petrol DCT
models.description: The all-new Kia Seltos is badass. Forever. Experience reliable, strong, and efficiently engineered performance with 117.5 kW and 253 Nm, redefining every journey with smooth power and superior refinement. Dimensions – 4,460 mm L x 1,830 mm W x 1,635 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,690 mm.

models.name: Seltos 1.5L CRDi VGT Diesel MT
models.description: The all-new Kia Seltos is badass. Forever. Crafted for strength and fuel efficiency, the 1.5i CRDi VGT Diesel engine produces 85 kW and 250 Nm, offering smooth driving dynamics and superior responsiveness on every journey. Dimensions – 4,460 mm L x 1,830 mm W x 1,635 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,690 mm.
